ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geometric_shapes" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geometric shape */,
  "row" INTEGER /* Row index of the shape data */,
  "column" INTEGER /* Column index of the shape data */,
  "demarcated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shape is demarcated */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the shape */,
  "solidity" REAL /* Solidity of the shape */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity of the shape */,
  "equivalent_diameter" REAL /* Equivalent diameter of the shape */,
  "perimeter" REAL /* Perimeter of the shape */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Degree of the shape */,
  "shape_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the shape */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the shape belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shape data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shape data was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the shape */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geometric_shapes_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shape_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shape being analyzed */,
  "strength" REAL /* Strength measure of the shape */,
  "betweenness" REAL /* Betweenness centrality of the shape */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm used to compute the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_metrics_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES geometric_shapes ("shape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_metrics_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm run */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm used */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm run started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm run ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., completed, failed, running) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_runs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_runs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
